name: Rube Bloom
description: American songwriter, pianist, arranger, band leader, recording artist, vocalist, and author (1902–1976)
abstract: Reuben Bloom (April 24, 1902 – March 30, 1976) was an American songwriter, pianist, arranger, band leader, recording artist, vocalist, and author.

about_quotes.speaker: Ram Ramirez
about_quotes.evidence: Then there was also (?)Rube Bloom(?). I was very impressed. He did "Sapphire"... Rube Bloom(?) was one of them with piano solos

about_quotes.speaker: Walter P. Thomas
about_quotes.evidence: Rube Bloom, I think he had something to do with it -- he was one of the writers. They had the idea of making the show look like a Broadway show. And they decided to write me out of the show
